sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n83288" key="pissokwni/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πισσο-κωνία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n83288.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">tarring</tr_> of sheep, ibid.</sense> </entryFree>
